title: The Following Should Be Considered When Assessing Risk Opsec
source_filename: The Following Should Be Considered When Assessing Risk Opsec.docx

qas.q: Blank) are like pieces of a puzzle an adversary used to reveal a picture our operations
Which is not an example of an OPSEC countermeasure?
qas.a: sudden change to a predictable routine

qas.q: Match the five-step OPSEC process with the action associated with the step
qas.a:
A. Identify critical information
B. Assess risks
C. Analyze vulnerabilities
D.Analyze threats
E.Apply countermeasures

qas.q: The following should be considered when assessing risk
qas.a:
ALL OF THE ABOVE
What is the effect of the mission, the cost of avoiding risk, how will adversary benefit from indicator, consequences of actions, will something you do or say provide indicator.

qas.q: Work related information posted to social networking sites were discussed in public may create (blank) that can be exported by the adversary

qas.a:
A method for denying adversary access to critical information
A process, not a set of rules
Part of everyone's job - including yours
